name: postgresql-plpython3-18
title: postgresql-plpython3-18
description:
PL/Python 3 procedural language for PostgreSQL 18
PL/Python 3 enables an SQL developer to write procedural language functions
for PostgreSQL 18 in Python 3.  You need this package if you have any
PostgreSQL 18 functions that use the languages plpython3 or plpython3u.
.
PostgreSQL is an object-relational SQL database management system.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use postgresql-plpython3-18 because PL/Python 3 procedural language for PostgreSQL 18.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use postgresql-plpython3-18 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair postgresql-plpython3-18 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `postgresql-plpython3-18 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
